plan: Unified URL Input + Input Mode Wiring
context: The Input tab has three mode buttons (Upload / Paste / URL) but only Upload works. The Paste and URL panels exist in HTML but have no JS wiring. The URL fetch button calls a yt-dlp-only endpoint and hardcodes audio/mpeg. Goal: ONE URL input that auto-detects any URL type and handles it correctly.

steps.title: Backend: Unified /api/ingest-url endpoint
details: Replace existing /api/ingest-url (line 1862) with smart auto-detecting endpoint
Add _detect_url_type() helper: HEAD request → Content-Type check
Add _is_known_video_site() helper for YouTube/Vimeo/etc pattern matching
Detection order: HEAD → HTML+video site=yt-dlp → HTML=scrape → audio/video/PDF/image=direct download → unknown=try yt-dlp then scrape
Unified response: { success, type: scraped|downloaded|ytdlp, title, basename, pages, chars, file: {name, size, content_type} }
Keep old /api/download endpoint intact for backward compat

steps.title: Frontend: Rewrite downloadUrl()
details: Replace lines 2196-2248 to call /api/ingest-url instead of /api/download
Branch on data.type: scraped → queue as completed + refresh source tab; downloaded/ytdlp → fetch blob, queue as queued
Add _guessMimeType(filename) helper for correct MIME types
Reset error color on new attempts

steps.title: Frontend: Wire input mode switching
details: Add switchInputMode(mode) method to InputTab — toggles data-input-panel visibility and button active state
In bindEvents() (line 2936): add handler for [data-input-mode] clicks before the [data-action] handler
Remove init() logic (lines 2117-2121) that conditionally hides URL panel based on ytdlpAvailable

steps.title: Frontend: Wire paste submission
details: Add submitPaste() method to InputTab — calls existing POST /api/paste, creates synthetic file in queue as completed, refreshes source tab

steps.title: Frontend: Fix action mismatch + expand ALLOWED_EXTS
details: Change case 'url-download' (line 2946) → case 'url-ingest' to match HTML data-action

steps.title: HTML: Update placeholder and status text
details: Line 424: placeholder → 'Paste any URL — YouTube, web page, PDF, image, audio...'
Line 431: status → 'Auto-detects: web pages, YouTube, audio/video, PDFs, images'

verification: Start server: cd tools && python ocr_server.py
Open workbench, click Paste → type text → Submit → should appear in queue as completed
Click URL → paste a YouTube link → Fetch → should download MP3 and queue it
Click URL → paste a web article URL → Fetch → should scrape text and show as completed
Click URL → paste a direct PDF link → Fetch → should download and queue for OCR
Upload tab still works normally for drag-and-drop
